docket_entries.description: SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF JUN-24-2024 - JUDGMENT.

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF ARMSTRONG, DAISY RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT GARCIA, CYNTHIA $2,191.00 PRINCIPAL, TOTAL JUDGMENT $2,191.00 STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS NO EXHIBITS FILED
MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $3,920.00 FILED BY ARMSTRONG, DAISY AS TO DEFENDANT GARCIA, CYNTHIA ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR JUN-24-2024 AT 08:30 AM IN DEPT 506

REQUEST TO WAIVE COURT FEES AND COSTS PURSUANT TO G.C. 68633, CRC 3.51, 8.26, AND 8.818 (CONFIDENTIAL) FILED BY PLAINTIFF ARMSTRONG, DAISY ORDER FOR WAIVER OF COURT FEES AND COSTS GRANTED PURSUANT TO G.C. 68634 (E), CRC 3.52
PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF SERVICE FEE: $50 (WAIVED) SERVED APR-29-2024, PERSONAL SERVICE AS TO DEFENDANT GARCIA, CYNTHIA
STIPULATION TO USE JUDGE PRO TEM FILED BY ARMSTRONG, DAISY GARCIA, CYNTHIA

SMALL CLAIMS CALENDAR OF JUN-24-2024 - TAKEN UNDER SUBMISSION AS OF JUN-24-2024 BY JUDGE PRO TEM. PLAINTIFF DAISY AMSTGRONG IS PRESENT. DEFENDANT CYNTHIA GARCIA IS PRESENT. NO EXHIBITS RETAINED. JUDGE PRO TEM: CURTIS SMOLAR; CLERK: D. CARTER. NOT REPORTED.(D506)
